name: Fraud Freeze
name_jp: イカサマ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>御</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>度</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per turn, when your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) from the hand (except during the Damage Step): You can return to the hand all monsters your opponent controls that were Special Summoned from the hand. If neither player controls a "Flower Cardian" Synchro Monster, send this card to the Graveyard.
eff: Once per turn, when your opponent Special Summons a monster(s) from the hand (except during the Damage Step): You can return to the hand all monsters your opponent controls that were Special Summoned from the hand. If neither player controls a "Flower Cardian" Synchro Monster, send this card to the Graveyard.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Sends itself from field to Graveyard
